text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon, as I head to the cafeteria to eat...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRACK!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh NOOOOO! My tea cup has cracked agaaaain!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: C-calm down. It can still hold tea, can't it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But this is the fifth one! There's no way I'll be
ready in time for the tea party!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Nngh... At this rate... At this rate...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
My elegant tea party with King is but a distant
dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Look, everyone has to start somewhere. I used to
break stuff all the time too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I remember when I cried over a stain on my skirt,
and Ryan had to console me. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
See? Give it another go. I'll help you till you get it
right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
After all, I know what it's like to want to get
closer to someone.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes! Please teach me the rules of etiquette!
Make a dame of the ditz before you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober continues her tea etiquette lesson.
However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRUMBLE!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?! I crushed my scooooone?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
D-don't sweat it! Let's save the snacks for later
and move on to pouring tea...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRACK!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: AAAAGH! The teapot handle broke off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-we'll just glue it back on! Once it's repaired,
we'll try again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite their valiant efforts, time passes without
much progress...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sniff... I can't believe it's already night, and I still can't even pour a simple cup of tea!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is terrible. Absolutely dreadful. I trained hard
so I could keep my prince happy, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But my princessly right hand is too unruly!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But this just proves how hard you're working to
make your dream come true. Don't blame
yourself. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I seem to remember a certain someone stressing
the importance of working towards something?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The most important thing is the desire to improve yourself. It's all about working toward becoming your ideal self!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you're ever stuck in a rut, I'm certain we can
push through it together with guts and
determination, just like we did with that boulder!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Now's the time to show off your princessly guts,
don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I've been out-princessed. This gives me no
choice but to...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HAI...YAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Scale any walls that get in my way! Just like you
did before!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! I want to recapture that
feeling, so I'm off to give the punching bag a
thorough beating!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Just like me, huh? Now that she mentions
it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I don't need to force myself to change.
Because that moment already changed me for the
better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Looks like Kawakami helped me realize
something important yet again. I have to work
hard to repay her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Aware of her own growth, Mejiro Dober sets off
in pursuit of Kawakami Princess.
